case_summary: Garage door hangs crooked, one side dropped; one of the lifting cables has frayed and parted.

ground_truth.notes: Frayed / snapped lifting cable case. Tests that the system correctly diagnoses cable failure rather than misdiagnosing as a spring or motor issue, since all three present with 'door won't go up properly'.

inputs.user_text: Our garage door is hanging crooked — the left side is much lower than the right and the door tilts diagonally when we try to lift it. Looking at the corners I can see a steel cable has frayed and snapped on the left side. The door is jammed at an angle now.
